title: poa araratica subsp. pseudoaltaica
intro: Poa araratica subsp. pseudoaltaica, also known as Pseudoaltaica, is a subspecies of a grass that is native to Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseudoaltaica include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Pseudoaltaica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
